elements.text:
You and your friends took some pictures together. The next day, you get a notification that they tagged you in a post on social media. You don't like how you look in the picture.

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I want to have the picture removed, but decide to let my friend keep it up.
I comment on the picture about how much fun we had.
I start to delete all pictures where I don't look great, but stop because keeping the memories is more important.
I call my friend and yell at them.
